reason: A middle‐school teacher draws on steadfast dedication to shape young lives.
A young girl’s unwavering courage leads geese on a journey of survival.
A woman finds purpose through quiet work and community rebirth.
A determined pig proves anything is possible with steadfast heart.
A man endures years in prison with dignity and hope intact.
A dog’s perseverance and unbreakable spirit guide three friends home.
A prodigy battles his past and finds inner strength through friendship.
A loyal butler upholds his principles despite personal sacrifice.
A young girl’s resilience and imagination sustain her through hardship.
A dreamer’s quiet resolve amid blizzards finds meaning in small victories.
